title: Admin Console
description: Manage identity, app registry, entitlements, and operations across the constellation.

apps.title: App Registry
apps.description: Register satellite apps, manage client credentials and redirect URIs.

entitlements.title: Entitlements
entitlements.description: Grant or revoke per-user access to satellite apps.

users.title: Users
users.description: Lock/unlock accounts, reset passwords, force logout.

loginHistory.title: Login History
loginHistory.description: Audit sign-in activity across the constellation.
